title: nephrolepis splendens
intro: Nephrolepis splendens, also known as the Boston fern, is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Nephrolepis splendens include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular choice for air-purifying plants. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
